mapper.select:
select c.id as counselor_id, c.user_id, u.name as counselor_name, u.phone, c.specialty, c.title, c.years_of_experience, c.status as counselor_status, c.create_time as counselor_create_time, c.update_time as counselor_update_time from counselor c left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.id
and u.name like concat('%', #{counselorName}, '%')
and c.specialty like concat('%', #{specialty}, '%')
and c.status = #{status}
order by c.id desc
select c.id, c.user_id, u.name as counselor_name, c.specialty, c.title from counselor c inner join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.id where c.status = 1 and u.status = 1 order by c.id asc

select c.id as counselor_id, c.user_id, u.name as counselor_name, u.phone, c.specialty, c.title, c.years_of_experience, c.introduction, c.avatar_file_id, c.status as counselor_status, c.create_time as counselor_create_time, c.update_time as counselor_update_time,
cs.id as schedule_id, cs.counselor_id as schedule_counselor_id, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.status as schedule_status, cs.remark as schedule_remark, cs.create_time as schedule_create_time, cs.update_time as schedule_update_time from counselor c left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.id left join counselor_schedule cs on c.id = cs.counselor_id where c.id = #{id} order by cs.schedule_date asc, cs.start_time asc

select c.id as counselor_id, c.user_id, u.name as counselor_name, u.phone, c.specialty, c.title, c.years_of_experience, c.introduction, c.avatar_file_id, c.status as counselor_status, c.create_time as counselor_create_time, c.update_time as counselor_update_time,
cs.id as schedule_id, cs.counselor_id as schedule_counselor_id, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.status as schedule_status, cs.remark as schedule_remark, cs.create_time as schedule_create_time, cs.update_time as schedule_update_time from counselor c left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.id left join counselor_schedule cs on c.id = cs.counselor_id and cs.status = 1 and cs.schedule_date >= curdate() where c.id = #{id} and c.status = 1 and u.status = 1 and ( cs.id is null or not exists ( select 1 from appointment a where a.schedule_id = cs.id and a.status in (1, 2, 3) ) ) order by cs.schedule_date asc, cs.start_time asc
mapper.update: update counselor set specialty = #{specialty}, title = #{title}, years_of_experience = #{yearsOfExperience}, introduction = #{introduction}, avatar_file_id = #{avatarFileId}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update counselor set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from counselor where user_id = #{userId}
